# pexip_infinity_media_processing_server (Resource)

Manages a media processing server with the Infinity service. Media processing servers provide advanced media handling capabilities for conferencing, such as transcoding, recording, and streaming services that extend beyond the core Pexip Infinity functionality.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_media_processing_server" "example" {
  fqdn = "media-server.example.com"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the media processing server. Maximum length: 253 characters.

### Read-Only

- `app_id` (String) The application ID for the media processing server. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `id` (String) Resource URI for the media processing server
- `public_jwt_key` (String) The public JWT key used for authentication with the media processing server.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the media processing server
